meaning: Bureau of Land Management(美国内政部)土地管理局
examples: He attended a meeting concerning the EIS with the New Mexico director of BLM, Jesse Juen.
BLM helped DRK kill the addons.
Objective To observe the effect of bleomycin (BLM) on structure of immune organs.
As of Dec 2011, BLM says 38m acres are permitted for oil and gas.
Right now, the helium being sold by BLM accounts for more than 30% of the helium sold worldwide.
